title: Ubiquiti UACC-ENVR-Bezel - UniFi Enterprise NVR Bezel
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise NVR Bezel is an accessory from the Enterprise series, designed for business environments The bezel intended for installation on the ENVR elegantly covers the drive bays, protecting them against unauthorized access . It also adds adjustable LED front lighting and, most importantly, features a 4.7" touch LCD display Display of HDD information Display of ENVR information Live camera preview Settings for fan speed, LED color and intensity, and display backlight brightness Option to restart / shut down the device
